languages.text: {n}В помещении раздается зловещее жужжание пробудившихся излучателей. Зеленые лучи концентрически сходятся на фигуре в центре платформы, превращая воина в эфемерный застывший призрак. До своей последней секунды {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}Астартес{/g} пристально смотрит на вас, не издавая ни звука.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}В помещении раздается зловещее жужжание пробудившихся излучателей. Зеленые лучи концентрически сходятся на фигуре в центре платформы, превращая воина в эфемерный застывший призрак. До своей последней секунды {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}космодесантник{/g} пристально смотрит на вас, не издавая ни звука.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The ominous buzzing of the awakened emitters echoes through the room. The green beams converge concentrically on the figure in the centre of the platform, turning the warrior into an ephemeral, frozen ghost. Until his last second, the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}Astartes{/g} stares at you without making a sound.{/n}

Зеленые лучи концентрически сходятся на фигуре в центре платформы, превращая воина в эфемерный застывший призрак. Until his last second, the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}Astartes{/g} stares at you without making a sound.{/n}

languages.text: {n}目覚めたエミッターの不吉な唸り声が部屋に響き渡る。緑色のビームが円形に中央の戦士に集まり、戦士は一瞬の凍りついた幽霊となる。最後の瞬間まで、スペースマリーンは声を上げずにあなたを見つめている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The ominous buzzing of the awakened emitters echoes through the room. The green beams converge concentrically on the figure in the centre of the platform, turning the warrior into an ephemeral, frozen ghost. Until his last second, the Space Marine stares at you without making a sound.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}目覚めたエミッターの不吉な唸り声が部屋に響き渡る。緑色のビームが円形に中央の戦士に集まり、戦士は一瞬の凍りついた幽霊となる。最後の瞬間まで、スペースマリーンは声を上げずにあなたを見つめている。{/n}

languages.text: {n}El siniestro zumbido de los emisores recién despiertos resuena por la sala. Los haces verdes convergen sobre la figura en el centro de la plataforma, convirtiendo al guerrero en un fantasma efímero y helado. El {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}Astartes{/g} no te quita ojo de encima, guardando silencio hasta el final.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The ominous buzzing of the awakened emitters echoes through the room. The green beams converge concentrically on the figure in the centre of the platform, turning the warrior into an ephemeral, frozen ghost. Until his last second, the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}Astartes{/g} stares at you without making a sound.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El siniestro zumbido de los emisores recién despiertos resuena por la sala. Los haces verdes convergen sobre la figura en el centro de la plataforma, convirtiendo al guerrero en un fantasma efímero y helado. El {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}Astartes{/g} no te quita ojo de encima, guardando silencio hasta el final.{/n}

languages.text: {n}装置启动的不详嗡鸣在厅堂内回荡。绿色的光束汇聚于平台中央的身影上，将那名战士化为一道虚幻又凝固的幽影。直至最后一刻，那名{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}阿斯塔特{/g}都无声地凝视着你。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The ominous buzzing of the awakened emitters echoes through the room. The green beams converge concentrically on the figure in the centre of the platform, turning the warrior into an ephemeral, frozen ghost. Until his last second, the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}Astartes{/g} stares at you without making a sound.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}装置启动的不详嗡鸣在厅堂内回荡。绿色的光束汇聚于平台中央的身影上，将那名战士化为一道虚幻又凝固的幽影。直至最后一刻，那名{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}阿斯塔特{/g}都无声地凝视着你。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Das unheilvolle Summen der erweckten Sender hallt durch den Raum. Die grünen Strahlen nähern sich der Gestalt in der Mitte der Plattform konzentrisch an und verwandeln den Krieger in einen flüchtigen, zu Eis erstarrten Geist. Bis zu seiner letzten Sekunde starrt dich der {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}Astartes{/g} an, ohne ein Geräusch von sich zu geben.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The ominous buzzing of the awakened emitters echoes through the room. The green beams converge concentrically on the figure in the centre of the platform, turning the warrior into an ephemeral, frozen ghost. Until his last second, the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}Astartes{/g} stares at you without making a sound.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Das unheilvolle Summen der erweckten Sender hallt durch den Raum. Die grünen Strahlen nähern sich der Gestalt in der Mitte der Plattform konzentrisch an und verwandeln den Krieger in einen flüchtigen, zu Eis erstarrten Geist. Bis zu seiner letzten Sekunde starrt dich der {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}Astartes{/g} an, ohne ein Geräusch von sich zu geben.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Uyandırılan yayıcıların uğursuz vızıltısı, odada yankılanıyor. Yeşil ışınla, platformun merkezindeki figürün üzerinde eş merkezli olarak birleşiyor ve savaşçıyı uçucu, donmuş bir hayalete dönüştürüyor. {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}Astartes{/g}, son anına kadar ses çıkarmadan sana bakıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The ominous buzzing of the awakened emitters echoes through the room. The green beams converge concentrically on the figure in the centre of the platform, turning the warrior into an ephemeral, frozen ghost. Until his last second, the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}Astartes{/g} stares at you without making a sound.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Uyandırılan yayıcıların uğursuz vızıltısı, odada yankılanıyor. Yeşil ışınla, platformun merkezindeki figürün üzerinde eş merkezli olarak birleşiyor ve savaşçıyı uçucu, donmuş bir hayalete dönüştürüyor. {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}Astartes{/g}, son anına kadar ses çıkarmadan sana bakıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le bourdonnement sinistre des émetteurs réveillés emplit la pièce. Les faisceaux verts convergent de manière concentrique vers la forme au centre de la plateforme, transformant le guerrier en un fantôme figé. Jusqu'à son dernier souffle, le membre de l'{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}Astartes{/g} garde les yeux rivés sur vous sans produire le moindre son.{/n}
